title: Crops & Crystals
description: Crops & Crystals adds blooming crops and detailed amethyst growth stages, bringing life and sparkle to your world. 🌸🔮
body:
# 🌾 Crops & Crystals

Bring a touch of nature and sparkle to your Minecraft world! ✨  

**Crops & Crystals** adds gentle visual enhancements to your farms and caves — blending floral charm with crystal shine while keeping the game’s vanilla feel.  

---

## 🌸 Features
- 🌿 **Flowering Crops:** Fully grown **wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroots, and nether wart** now bloom with tiny flowers.  
- 🍈 **Unique Stems:** **Pumpkin and melon stems** have distinct looks for better visual variety.  
- 💎 **Refined Amethyst:** **Amethyst buds** now display different textures for each growth stage, showing subtle progression.  

---

A perfect balance of **detail and simplicity**, making your world feel alive — one bloom and crystal at a time. 💫
